# Staff Applied Machine Learning Scientist- GenAI
...
Grainger’s Sales Machine Learning team is seeking a Staff Applied Machine Learning Scientist to serve as a technical leader for Generative AI and agentic AI applications across the Sales domain. In this role, you will help design and build Grainger’s Sales AI platform, enabling 3,000+ sellers to work more productively, serve customers more effectively, and drive measurable business growth.
...
You will lead the development of scalable AI systems that combine LLMs, machine learning models, retrieval, tools, APIs, workflow orchestration, evaluation, and monitoring. The work focuses on building production-ready virtual assistants and deep agents across mobile and web experiences. You will set the technical direction, establish patterns for reliable and governed AI systems, mentor engineers, and partner with product, engineering, design, and business stakeholders to turn high-value Sales opportunities into production-ready AI capabilities.
...

About Grainger:
...
W.W. Grainger, Inc., is a leading broad line distributor with operations primarily in North America, Japan and the United Kingdom. At Grainger, We Keep the World Working® by serving more than 4.5 million customers worldwide with products and solutions delivered through innovative technology and deep customer relationships. Known for its commitment to service and award-winning culture, the Company had 2024 revenue of $17.2 billion across its two business models. In the High-Touch Solutions segment, Grainger offers approximately 2 million maintenances, repair and operating (MRO) products and services, including technical support and inventory management. ## Grainger Corporate Services LLC is seeking a Data Engineer III in Lake Forest, IL with the following requirements: Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology, or related field plus 3 years of related experience. Prior experience must include: Created and managed scalable ETL pipelines for analytics dashboards, visualization, machine learning, abstractions, infrastructure. Work with AWS services implementation; Create and maintain optimal data pipeline architecture. Assemble large, complex data sets that meet functional and non-functional requirements; Build the infrastructure required for optimal extraction, transformation and loading of data from wide variety of data sources using Kafka and spark big data technologies; Create data tools for analytics and data scientists that assist them in building and optimizing product into innovative industry leader. Up to 25% domestic travel required to conferences and team meetings.100% remote work allowed from anywhere in the U.S.

results.title: Eswar Krishna G.
highlights:
Data Scientist & Gen AI Engineer @ Grainger | Master’s in Machine Learning, AI and Robotics
...
Senior Applied Machine Learning Engineer at [Grainger](https://www.linkedin.com/company/w.w.-grainger)
...
I’m a Generative AI Engineer and Data Scientist passionate about harnessing cutting-edge technologies like generative AI, machine learning, and computer vision to deliver impactful solutions. At Nationwide Insurance, I spearheaded the development of a multi-agent chatbot for third-party risk teams, enabling seamless querying of terabytes of structured and unstructured data—slashing response times from hours to minutes. I also engineered a multimodal Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipeline powered by LLaMA 3, incorporating layout-aware document processing to boost data accessibility for customer service reps. These innovations optimized workflows and empowered teams to make swift, data-driven decisions. Beyond generative AI, I excel in designing and deploying machine learning models to assess risk and price insurance policies, driving a 28% improvement in prediction accuracy through techniques like BBC-CV, multi-criteria stratification, and GLM/non-GLM models. I earned a Master’s in Computer Engineering from Arizona State University, specializing in AI and Robotics, and published research in the Elsevier Journal on a vehicle detection method using color intensity segregation, achieving a 90% detection rate optimized for real-time use. My "Smart Bus Transportation App" won funding and accolades in the Texas Instruments: Indian Innovation Challenge Design Competition, and I graduated as Valedictorian with a gold medal from IIIT D&M. My technical toolkit includes Python, R, SQL, TensorFlow, PyTorch, OpenCV, AWS, Spark, Hadoop, and expertise in Machine Learning, NLP, Reinforcement Learning, and Data Mining. Fueled by a drive to tackle complex challenges, I’m dedicated to advancing generative AI and machine learning to solve real-world problems and create meaningful value.
...

Decreased average handle time by 40% and increased satisfaction by over 55% ▪ Implemented underwriting agent that evaluates a current agreement with guidelines each clause wise and inform each clause with risk rating and recommendations to fix. Reduced time to evaluate underwriting and middle market agents review time from couple of days to few hours ▪ Spearheaded development and deployment of an agentic annuity chatbot combining advanced RAG pipeline with external competitor analysis to deliver real time insights to wholesalers selling annuities
...

...
▪ Led a cross-functional team to engineer a model leveraging enhanced GPS features, such as number of lanes, road type, and weather conditions, resulting in a 28% improvement in the Gini index for pure premium prediction. ▪ Developed an XG Boost model to identify the instance of loss out of potential trips based on 15 Hz sensor data with 92% Recall and 89% Precision ▪ Designed Generic Machine Learning framework to price new insurance policies as per the risk of a home (product of severity and frequency models) ▪ Implemented robust modeling techniques like BBC-CV, multi-criteria stratification on GLM and Non-GLM models

results.title: Software Engineer IV (LAKE FOREST, IL, US, 60045-5203) | Hirequorum
highlights:
# Software Engineer IV (LAKE FOREST, IL, US, 60045-5203)
...
### About Grainger
...
- 
- W.W. Grainger, Inc., is a leading broad line distributor with operations primarily in North America, Japan and the United Kingdom. At Grainger, We Keep the World Working® by serving more than 4.5 million customers worldwide with products and solutions delivered through innovative technology and deep customer relationships. Known for its commitment to service and award-winning culture, the Company had 2024 revenue of $17.2 billion across its two business models. In the High-Touch Solutions segment, Grainger offers approximately 2 million maintenance, repair and operating (MRO) products and services, including technical support and inventory management. In the Endless Assortment segment, Zoro.com offers customers access to more than 14 million products, and MonotaRO.com offers more than 24 million products. For more information, visit www.grainger.com.
...
### Position Details:
...
- 

- 
- As a Saff Software Engineer (Software Engineer IV) you will develop applications that align with a strategic vision. In addition to coaching engineers, you will partner with key stakeholders including Product Managers and Architecture. You will embrace curiosity to ensure a deep understanding of the business requirements that drive the analysis and physical design of technical solutions.

- 

- 
- You will work as a Staff engineer in the Customer Order Domain. This domain is responsible for four main function areas:

- 
- 

- The cart customers interact with on, eventually, all channels at Grainger. Currently this is limited to our main Grainger.com experience. 

- Provide internal capabilities to calculate the cost of an Order to a customer. This means resolving interesting Freight, Pricing and Tax considerations for our customers. 

- Customer facing experiences and proactive order notifications of an order lifecycle. 

- Lastly, we manage the payment and invoicing capabilities to ensure people can securely access their payment information. 

- 



You Will:
...
- 
- 

- Lead engineer on a team responsible for the application and delivery of high-quality, maintainable software for highly complex applications

- Own engineering culture within the team championing sensible defaults to enable continuous delivery activities

- Contribute to continuous learning on your team culture by leading knowledge sharing sessions with latest technological features and engineering practices

- Maintain software in production with demonstrated ability to triage and resolve issues

- Mentor developers, conduct code reviews, and participate in pair programming

- Drive complex technical initiatives in partnership with Architects

- Partners directly with IT Management team to ensure successful design and delivery of technology based solutions

- 
- You Have:

- 
- 

- Bachelor's Degree or equivalent experience in computer science or similar; or equivalent experience required

- 5+ years experience as a Software Engineer; with experience in modern software engineering; designing; developing, testing and deploying scalable software applications within a variety of technologies and environments required

- Expert knowledge of programming skills; JVM, Kotlin, Typescript, React, or similar languages

- Strong focus on backend with working knowledge of front end 

- Demonstrated knowledge of distributed system design and integration patterns

- Understanding of event driven data streaming architectures

- Familiarity with Agile/Scrum methodologies and Dev Ops Practices

- Experience with analyzing, interpreting and communicating complex problems and practices

results.title: W.W. Grainger Machine Learning Engineer Interview Questions 2026
highlights:
W.W. Grainger Machine Learning Engineer Interview Questions 2026
...
W.W. Grainger Machine Learning Engineer Interview Questions 2026
...
# W.W. Grainger Machine Learning Engineer interview questions & guide 2026
...
### 1. What is a Machine Learning Engineer at W.W. Grainger?
...
At **W.W. Grainger**, a **Machine Learning Engineer** (specifically within the **Machine Learning Engineer II** tier) plays a pivotal role in keeping the global supply chain moving. Operating within the **Inventory Planning and Optimization** organization, this team manages over **10 million SKUs** and nearly **$2 billion in inventory** across North America. The machine learning solutions you build and scale directly impact how, when, and where inventory is allocated to serve millions of customers.
...
This role is the critical bridge between data science prototypes and robust production environments. While data scientists focus on designing forecasting and optimization algorithms, you will be responsible for building the scalable data pipelines, containerized infrastructure, and automated deployment systems that allow these models to run reliably at enterprise scale. Your work ensures that critical supply chain decisions are backed by high-performing, observable, and resilient systems.
...
### Machine Learning Operations (MLOps) & Infrastructure
...
Machine Learning & Optimization Concepts
...
### Practical Machine Learning & Optimization
...
As a **Machine Learning Engineer II** at **W.W. Grainger**, your core mission is to build, deploy, and maintain the machine learning systems that drive supply chain efficiency. On a day-to-day basis, you will:
...
* **Collaborate Across Teams** – Partner closely with data scientists to translate prototype models (often written in Jupyter Notebooks) into clean, production-grade **Python** packages. You will also coordinate with data engineers to align on data sources and table schemas.
...
* **Build and Orchestrate Pipelines** – Design, write, and maintain robust ETL pipelines and workflow DAGs using **Airflow** and **Astronomer** to automate model training, validation, and batch inference.
...
* **Manage Containerized Infrastructure** – Package machine learning models into **Docker** containers and deploy them onto **AWS** and **Kubernetes** clusters, ensuring high availability and optimal resource utilization.
...
* **Modernize MLOps Tooling** – Evaluate and integrate modern MLOps tools (such as **Databricks**, **MLflow**, and **Kubeflow**) to improve development speed, model tracking, and system observability.
...
* **Experience** – At least **2+ years** of professional experience developing, deploying, and maintaining production-level machine learning or data-intensive software systems using **Python**.
...
* **Data & Orchestration** – Proven experience building data pipelines and automating workflows using orchestration tools like **Airflow**, along with strong **SQL** and database querying skills (e.g., **Snowflake**, **DuckDB**).
...
**Advanced M
...
abricks**
...
**Optimization Solvers** – Familiar
...
Joining **W.W. Grainger** as a **Machine Learning Engineer** offers a unique opportunity to apply cutting-edge MLOps and engineering principles to one of the largest supply chain operations in North America. By building systems that optimize **10 million SKUs** and **$2 billion in inventory**, your code will directly keep businesses, hospitals, and critical infrastructure working worldwide.
...
To maximize your chances of success, focus your preparation on the core pillars of the role: robust **Python** software engineering, containerization with **Docker** and **Kubernetes**, and pipeline automation using **Apache Airflow**. Treat the take-home assessment as your primary opportunity to showcase your engineering standards, ensuring your submission is modular, documented, and ready for production.

results.title: W.W. Grainger Applied Scientist Interview Questions 2026
highlights:
### What is an Applied Scientist at W.W. Grainger?
...
At **W.W. Grainger**, an **Applied Scientist** sits at the critical intersection of advanced machine learning research and robust software engineering. Unlike traditional data science roles that may focus primarily on offline modeling and analytical insights, this position is deeply rooted in operationalization. You will not only design sophisticated algorithms but also take full ownership of deploying, scaling, and monitoring them in a high-volume production environment.
...
This role is highly collaborative and strategically influential. You will work alongside product managers, data engineers, and software developers to translate business requirements into scalable machine learning systems. It is an exciting opportunity for someone who thrives on solving ambiguous, large-scale problems and enjoys seeing their code and models drive tangible business outcomes every day.
...
### Machine Learning & Natural Language Processing (NLP)
...
Because of the complexity of the **W.W. Grainger** product catalog, NLP and classification models are frequently tested. Interviewers want to see how you handle messy, high-cardinality text data.
...
the end-to-end lifecycle of
...
You will begin with an initial HR screening call to discuss your background and alignment with the team. This is followed by a managerial phone round that dives deeper into your past projects and system design experience. Next, you will transition to the technical evaluation phase, which includes a comprehensive take-home data science project and a live technical screen covering NLP, machine learning theory, and SQL. The
...
culminates in a panel video interview where you will review your take-home assignment and discuss your end-to-end deployment experience with a cross-functional team.
...
#### Machine Learning & Natural Language Processing (NLP)
...
This technical round evaluates your foundational understanding of machine learning algorithms and your ability to apply NLP techniques to text-heavy datasets. Given the nature of industrial supply catalogs, text classification and search relevance are highly prioritized.
...
* **Advanced concepts (less common)** – Zero-shot classification, fine-tuning large language models (LLMs) for domain-specific industrial terminology, and active learning strategies for labeling unstructured data.
...
.W. Grainger
...
-to-
...
* **Model Development & Experimentation** – You will design, train, and validate machine learning and NLP models to solve complex business problems, such as search relevance, product recommendations, and catalog enrichment.
...
* **Strong Machine Learning Foundation** – Deep understanding of supervised and unsupervised learning, NLP, and evaluation methodologies.
...
* **Production Coding in Python** – Proficiency in writing clean, PEP 8-compliant Python code, with experience using libraries like Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-Learn, and PyTorch or TensorFlow.
...
* **MLOps & Deployment Experience** – Hands-on experience containerizing applications with Docker and deploying models using cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, or Azure).
...
* **Search & Recommendation
...
Knowledge** –

ranking algorithms (LTR), collaborative filtering, or content

based recommendation systems
...

By focusing your preparation on end-to-end operationalization, NLP, robust SQL, and pragmatic system design, you will position yourself as a highly competitive candidate.

I’m an engineering and AI/ML leader who builds platforms that teams actually use. At Grainger (Fortune-500; ~25k employees), I lead Machine Learning Platform & Operations, bringing Databricks, Kubernetes, production-grade model serving, vector search, and multi-provider LLM access together so product, machine learning, data science, and analytics teams can ship faster. My approach is pragmatic and people-first: translate between data scientists, engineers, security, and business stakeholders; break down complex topics; and coach teams toward best practices. Recent outcomes include cutting onboarding from weeks to days, halving a major migration timeline without service impact, and introducing an AI search assistant that now resolves ~40% of support questions end-to-end. I’ve grown diverse, high-retention teams, promoted new leaders, and helped formalize AI/ML governance to drive responsible adoption at scale. Earlier in my career, I led ML engineering and platform work across consulting and sports technology. I'm passionate about MLOps, guesting on the MLOps Community podcast, showing up at local meetups, and contributing to research and IP along the way. Topics I enjoy: enterprise MLOps, responsible AI governance, model serving in production, AI enablement, and the human side of shipping ML.

results.title: Ivan Ortega
highlights:
Senior Manager, AI Platforms & Data Engineering | Agentic AI Systems Builder | LLM × MCP × Enterprise Scale | M.S. Data Science
...
Manager Analytics Enablement at [Grainger](https://www.linkedin.com/company/w.w.-grainger)
...
I build things that shouldn't exist yet — then ship them to production. As Senior Manager of Analytics Enablement at Grainger, I lead a team of 6 data and application engineers and serve as hands-on architect across a portfolio of AI-native platforms. In the past year I've designed and deployed three production agentic AI systems from scratch: An autonomous AI project management agent that monitors Jira epics, proactively flags project risks, drafts stakeholder communications with a human approval gate, and generates Gantt-based project plans — connected to Jira, Snowflake, SharePoint, Teams, and Kubernetes through a custom integration layer. An internal agentic analysis assistant that gives our team natural language access to enterprise data across Snowflake and Jira. Features persona-aware responses, persistent memory, and on-demand report generation delivered as self-contained HTML documents. A contextual overlay agent that embeds into existing internal applications as an intelligent help layer — providing users with data-aware, page-contextual answers and workflow guidance without leaving the app they're already in. Underpinning all three: 12 home-authored MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers connecting AI workflows to Snowflake, Postgres, SQL Server, Jira, Confluence, SharePoint, Smartsheet, Kubernetes, Datadog, and more — all dual-use as deployable API servers on Kubernetes and installable ETL libraries for Airflow pipelines. I also created an internal design system — grounded in the principles of Tufte, Wroblewski, and Krug — now used as the standard across six enterprise applications. I recently completed my M.S. in Data Science at the University of Pittsburgh with a focus on Bayesian inference. I believe the next generation of data leaders has to understand the math, not just the tools.
...
Enablement at [
...
.linkedin.com
...
● Architected and deployed three production agentic AI systems: an autonomous project management agent, an enterprise data analysis assistant with memory and persona-aware reporting, and a contextual help overlay agent deployable across internal applications — all running on Claude Sonnet via AWS Bedrock, LangGraph, and Kubernetes (EKS). ● Home-authored 12 MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers spanning Snowflake, Postgres, SQL Server, Jira, Confluence, SharePoint, Smartsheet, Kubernetes, Datadog, and others — dual-use as Kubernetes-hosted API servers and pip-installable ETL libraries for Airflow DAGs. ● Created and maintains an internal design system (Tufte
...
- Krug principles) adopted across six enterprise applications, bringing design consistency and data-dense, low-noise UI patterns to internal tooling. ● Leading strategic database migration from SQL Server to PostgreSQL, retiring stored procedures to C# services with schema redesign and automated migrations. ● Driving agentic AI adoption across the organization: LLM-assisted ETL package generation, automated pipeline development, and AI-accelerated full-stack prototyping — significantly compressing delivery timelines. ● Mentoring a team of 6 across data engineering and full-stack application development (React/TypeScript, Blazor, Python, FastAPI, .NET).

Come work on our very cool ML team solving key challenges in Product Discovery and Information Retrieval using skillsets spanning NLP, ML Engineering, LLMs and Vector Search ! You'll be solving customer facing, high value business problems. 

Grainger is consistently ranked as one of the best places to work in the country. If you know someone who's interested, point them this way. #ai #ml #vectorsearch #search #nlp #deeplearning #llm #genai Yet another opening @ Grainger - my teammate Amruta Nanavaty is looking for a  Senior-level Applied ML Scientist. Come join a growing, startup-like org within a stable, Fortune 100 Best Companies to Work For company! This position is remote-friendly. https://lnkd.in/g97N2kBd

HII-Mission Technologies is seeking a Senior Generative AI Engineer to join the team. This will be a remote position, with occasional travel to the team's office in Annapolis Junction, MD.
